proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with ECOG performance status 2 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with ECOG 0-1.
Patients with ECOG performance status 0 have longer mean pfs_months than patients with ECOG 1-2.
Patients with stage_iv == 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with stage_iv == 0.

analyses.result_summary: ECOG 2 mean pfs_months 3.289 (n=7437) vs 4.938 (n=42563) for ECOG 0-1; difference -1.650 months.
ECOG 0 mean pfs_months 5.640 (n=17592) vs 4.179 (n=32408) for ECOG 1-2; difference +1.461 months.
Stage IV mean pfs_months 3.617 (n=14969) vs 5.153 (n=35031) for non-stage-IV; difference -1.536 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with has_brain_mets == 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without brain metastases.
Patients with liver_mets == 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without liver metastases.
Patients with bone_mets == 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without bone metastases.
Patients with pleural_effusion == 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without pleural effusion.

analyses.result_summary: Brain-mets+ mean pfs_months 3.750 (n=5090) vs 4.800 (n=44910); diff -1.050.
Liver-mets+ pfs_months 4.708 vs 4.690; diff +0.018, NS.
Bone-mets+ pfs_months 4.723 vs 4.685; diff +0.038, NS.
Pleural-effusion+ pfs_months 4.664 vs 4.698; diff -0.034, NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with er_positive == 1 have longer mean pfs_months than ER-negative patients.
Patients with pr_positive == 1 have longer mean pfs_months than PR-negative patients.
Patients with her2_positive == 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than HER2-negative patients.
Patients with her2_low == 1 have longer mean pfs_months than patients with her2_low == 0.

analyses.result_summary: PR+ pfs_months 4.824 vs 4.462; diff +0.362.
HER2-low+ pfs_months 4.765 vs 4.650; diff +0.114.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with brca1_mutation == 1 have a different mean pfs_months than non-carriers.
Patients with brca2_mutation == 1 have a different mean pfs_months than non-carriers.
Patients with pik3ca_mutation == 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than wild-type.
Postmenopausal patients have a different mean pfs_months than premenopausal patients.

analyses.result_summary: BRCA1 mut pfs_months 4.669 (n=1277) vs 4.694; diff -0.024, NS.
BRCA2 mut pfs_months 4.569 (n=1222) vs 4.696; diff -0.127, marginal.
PIK3CA-mut pfs_months 4.328 vs 4.887; diff -0.559.
Postmenopausal pfs_months 4.684 vs 4.707; diff -0.023, NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving tamoxifen (overall, unstratified).
Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have longer mean pfs_months than those not receiving palbociclib (overall).
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving trastuzumab (overall).
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving olaparib (overall).
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it (overall).
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it (overall).

analyses.result_summary: Tamoxifen pfs_months 4.723 vs 4.680; diff +0.043, NS.
Palbociclib pfs_months 5.408 (n=17428) vs 4.310 (n=32572); diff +1.098.
Trastuzumab pfs_months 4.645 vs 4.705; diff -0.060.
Olaparib pfs_months 4.660 vs 4.696; diff -0.036, NS.
Sacituzumab pfs_months 4.686 vs 4.694; diff -0.007, NS.
Pembrolizumab pfs_months 4.630 vs 4.704; diff -0.074.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months is larger in er_positive patients than in er_negative patients (positive treatment-by-ER interaction).
Within er_positive patients, treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months relative to no palbociclib.
Within er_negative patients, treatment_palbociclib does not change mean pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib x er_positive interaction coefficient +1.594 months; highly significant.
In ER+ subgroup, palbociclib pfs_months 5.890 (n=12194) vs 4.313 (n=22692); diff +1.577.
In ER- subgroup, palbociclib pfs_months 4.285 (n=5234) vs 4.303 (n=9880); diff -0.017, NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months is attenuated in her2_positive patients (negative treatment-by-HER2 interaction).
Within her2_negative patients, treatment_palbociclib increases pfs_months but within her2_positive patients it does not.
treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months is similar in postmenopausal and premenopausal patients (no biologically meaningful interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib x her2_positive interaction -1.364 months. In HER2- diff +1.350, in HER2+ diff -0.014.
Palbociclib x postmenopausal interaction coef -0.134 (small). Effect is large in both strata (+1.045 postmen, +1.179 premen).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within her2_positive patients, treatment_trastuzumab increases mean pfs_months compared to no trastuzumab.
There is a positive treatment_trastuzumab x her2_positive interaction on pfs_months.
Within her2_low patients, treatment_trastuzumab increases mean pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: In HER2+ subgroup, trastuzumab pfs_months 4.254 (n=1890) vs 4.334 (n=7170); diff -0.079, NS.
Trastuzumab x HER2+ interaction coef -0.028, NS — no differential benefit in HER2+.
In HER2-low subgroup, trastuzumab pfs_months 4.752 vs 4.768; diff -0.016, NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within brca1_mutation+ or brca2_mutation+ patients (BRCA-mutant pooled), treatment_olaparib increases mean pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_olaparib x brca1_mutation interaction on pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_olaparib x brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.code: subset BRCA1 or BRCA2 mut; ttest_ind by olaparib
analyses.result_summary: In BRCA1/2-mut pooled (n=2499), olaparib pfs_months 4.933 (n=239) vs 4.587 (n=2260); diff +0.346.
Olaparib x BRCA1 interaction +0.446 months, marginal.
Olaparib x BRCA2 interaction +0.340 months, NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within HER2-low patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan increases mean pfs_months.
Within triple-negative (ER-, PR-, HER2-) patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan increases mean pfs_months.
Within triple-negative patients, treatment_pembrolizumab increases mean pfs_months.
Within msi_high patients, treatment_pembrolizumab increases mean pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: In HER2-low, sacituzumab pfs_months 4.737 (n=1833) vs 4.768 (n=16710); diff -0.031, NS.
In TNBC (n=10496), sacituzumab pfs_months diff -0.085, NS.
In TNBC, pembrolizumab pfs_months diff +0.072, NS.
In MSI-high (n=498), pembrolizumab pfs_months diff +0.141, NS (small subgroup).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with longer pfs_months (positive correlation).
Higher ki67_pct is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative correlation).
Larger tumor_size_cm is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative correlation).

analyses.result_summary: age_years strongly positively correlated with pfs_months: r=0.7015 (counterintuitive but very strong).
ki67_pct negatively correlated with pfs_months: r=-0.0914.
tumor_size_cm not correlated with pfs_months: r=0.0004, NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: albumin_g_dl positively correlated with pfs_months: r=+0.1002.
weight_loss_pct_6mo negatively correlated with pfs_months: r=-0.1155.
crp_mg_l essentially uncorrelated with pfs_months: r=-0.0033, NS.
nlr essentially uncorrelated with pfs_months: r=+0.0028, NS.
ldh_u_l weakly negatively correlated with pfs_months: r=-0.0164.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Routine vital signs (heart_rate_bpm, systolic_bp_mmhg, spo2_pct) are not associated with pfs_months once standard clinical features are accounted for.
Routine chemistries beyond albumin (ast, alt, total_bilirubin, creatinine, sodium, calcium) are not strongly associated with pfs_months.
Patient-reported symptom grades (fatigue_grade, pain_nrs, dyspnea_grade, cough_grade, appetite_loss_grade) are not associated with pfs_months.

analyses.code: pearsonr for HR, SBP, SpO2 vs pfs_months
analyses.result_summary: heart_rate_bpm r=0.0046 p=0.30; systolic_bp_mmhg r=0.0039 p=0.39; spo2_pct r=0.0042 p=0.35. None significant.

analyses.code: pearsonr for ast, alt, bilirubin, creatinine, calcium vs pfs
analyses.result_summary: ast r=-0.0026 (NS), alt r=-0.0036 (NS), total_bilirubin r=-0.0089 p=0.046, creatinine r=-0.0040 (NS), calcium r=-0.0128 p=0.004. Very weak signals at best.

analyses.code: pearsonr for symptom grades vs pfs
analyses.result_summary: fatigue r=0.0002 p=0.96; pain_nrs r=-0.0016 p=0.72; dyspnea r=0.0046 p=0.30; cough r=-0.0039 p=0.38; appetite_loss r=-0.0008 p=0.86. None significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Common comorbidities (diabetes_mellitus, hypertension, copd, chronic_kidney_disease, heart_failure, coronary_artery_disease, atrial_fibrillation) are not associated with pfs_months.
venous_thromboembolism_history, autoimmune_disease, depression_anxiety_diagnosis, prior_malignancy are not associated with pfs_months.
Prior treatments (prior_chemotherapy, prior_radiation, prior_surgery, prior_immunotherapy, prior_targeted_therapy) are not associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: VTE diff +0.042 (p=0.38), autoimmune -0.045 (p=0.38), depression -0.030 (p=0.30), prior_malignancy -0.047 (p=0.17). All NS.

prior_chemo diff +0.002 (p=0.94), prior_radiation +0.045 (p=0.06), prior_surgery +0.066 (p=0.005), prior_immunotherapy -0.001 (p=0.98), prior_targeted_therapy +0.006 (p=0.87). Only prior_surgery weakly significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: race_ethnicity strata differ in unadjusted mean pfs_months.
After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, er_positive, her2_positive, albumin_g_dl, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and treatment_palbociclib, race_ethnicity strata do not differ in pfs_months.
insurance_type strata do not differ in adjusted mean pfs_months.
rural_residence is not associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: white -0.039 (p=0.09), black +0.027 (p=0.44), hispanic +0.017 (p=0.58), asian +0.045 (p=0.34), other +0.070 (p=0.37). No race stratum significantly differs from the rest.

analyses.code: ols pfs_months ~ C(race_ethnicity) + age + ecog + stage_iv + er + her2 + alb + wl + palbo
analyses.result_summary: All race coefficients within ~|0.02| of asian reference; p-values 0.48-0.79. No adjusted disparity.
Medicare -0.007, private -0.008, uninsured +0.005 vs medicaid reference; all NS.
rural diff +0.027, p=0.34. NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib receipt rate among er_positive patients differs by race_ethnicity (treatment access disparity).
treatment_trastuzumab receipt rate among her2_positive patients differs by race_ethnicity.
treatment_palbociclib receipt rate among er_positive patients differs by insurance_type.

analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib receipt in ER+: white 35.0%, black 35.2%, hispanic 35.2%, asian 34.4%, other 35.1%. Spread ~1pp; chi-square NS.

analyses.code: chi2 on trastuzumab x race in HER2+
analyses.result_summary: Trastuzumab receipt in HER2+: black 18.2%, white 21.2%, asian 19.7%, hispanic 21.9%, other 21.7%. Largest gap ~3.7pp, but not significant in chi-square (p>0.1).

analyses.code: chi2 on palbociclib x insurance in ER+
analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib receipt in ER+: medicaid 35.0%, medicare 35.4%, private 34.5%, uninsured 35.4%. Spread <1pp; NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable OLS for pfs_months, treatment_palbociclib retains a strong positive coefficient even after adjusting for age, ECOG, stage IV, brain mets, ER, HER2, PIK3CA, albumin, weight loss, and ki67.

In the same multivariable model, treatment_trastuzumab, treatment_tamoxifen, treatment_olaparib, and treatment_pembrolizumab do not have a significant adjusted association with pfs_months in the overall cohort.
In the same multivariable model, age_years has a strong positive adjusted association with pfs_months and ECOG/stage_iv have strong negative adjusted associations.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted palbociclib coefficient +1.102 months/PFS (SE 0.011), highly significant.

Adjusted: trastuzumab -0.010 (p=0.46), tamoxifen -0.008 (p=0.49), olaparib -0.026 (p=0.13), sacituzumab +0.033 (p=0.054), pembrolizumab -0.020 (p=0.15). All non-significant or borderline; none clinically meaningful overall.
age +0.176/yr (p~0), ecog_ps -1.172/level (p~0), stage_iv -1.549 (p~0), brain_mets -0.983 (p~0), er +0.541, her2_positive -0.472, pik3ca -0.582, albumin +0.476, weight_loss -0.077, ki67 -0.019.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within er_positive patients, treatment_palbociclib remains strongly associated with longer pfs_months after adjusting for age, ecog_ps, stage_iv, her2_positive, and pik3ca_mutation.
Within her2_positive patients, treatment_trastuzumab is not associated with pfs_months after adjusting for age, ecog_ps, stage_iv.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted palbociclib coefficient +1.575 months/PFS in ER+ subgroup (SE 0.016), highly significant.
Adjusted trastuzumab coefficient -0.002 months/PFS in HER2+ (SE 0.014), p=0.89. No benefit detectable.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between ecog_ps and stage_iv on pfs_months (their joint negative effect is less than additive).
There is a small negative interaction between treatment_palbociclib and age_years (palbociclib benefit slightly declines with age).

analyses.result_summary: ecog_ps:stage_iv interaction coef +0.067 (p=0.040). Sign opposite to main effects -> sub-additive joint penalty.
palbociclib:age_years interaction -0.0032 months/yr (p=0.044). Marginal.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Common pharmacogenomic and inflammation-pathway SNPs (snp_rs1045642, snp_rs1065852, snp_rs1799853, snp_rs1800566, snp_rs2228001, snp_rs3813867, snp_rs4244285, snp_rs4986893, snp_rs1801133) are not associated with pfs_months.
APOE-related SNPs (snp_rs429358, snp_rs7412) and inflammatory SNPs (snp_rs1800896, snp_rs1800629) are not associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: All nine SNPs show |r|<0.006 with p>=0.20. No significant associations.

proposed_hypotheses.text: albumin_g_dl and weight_loss_pct_6mo each remain independently associated with pfs_months when modeled together with crp_mg_l, nlr, ldh_u_l, and ki67_pct.
crp_mg_l and nlr lose any apparent prognostic value once albumin_g_dl and weight_loss_pct_6mo are in the model.

analyses.code: ols pfs ~ alb + wl + crp + nlr + ldh + ki67
analyses.result_summary: Albumin +0.500 (p~0); weight_loss -0.075 (p~0); ldh -0.0005 (p<0.001); ki67 -0.019 (p~0). All significant in same model.
crp coef -0.0007 (p=0.57); nlr coef +0.002 (p=0.65). Neither significant when albumin and weight_loss are in the model.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within triple-negative breast cancer (ER-, PR-, HER2-), no tested treatment significantly improves pfs_months.
Within HER2+ patients, no tested treatment significantly improves pfs_months — palbociclib loses its overall effect because it is concentrated in ER+/HER2- biology.

analyses.result_summary: In TNBC (n=10496): sacituzumab diff -0.085 (p=0.22), pembrolizumab diff +0.072 (p=0.22). No significant treatment effects detected.
In HER2+: trastuzumab diff -0.079 (p=0.15); palbociclib diff -0.014 (p=0.76). No detectable treatment effect in HER2+ subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within er_positive AND her2_negative patients (the 'palbociclib-eligible' subgroup), treatment_palbociclib produces an even larger PFS benefit than the marginal effect.

analyses.code: subset ER+ & HER2-; ttest_ind by palbociclib
analyses.result_summary: In ER+/HER2- subgroup, palbociclib produces large PFS gains; the ER+ marginal interaction estimate (+1.575) is the same magnitude in HER2- ER+, since interactions show palbo is essentially inert outside ER+/HER2-.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among modifiable / non-tumor host factors, age_years has by far the largest absolute correlation with pfs_months.
Most patient-reported and routine-vital features carry no PFS information in this cohort once tumor biology and treatment are accounted for.

analyses.result_summary: |r| with pfs_months: age 0.70 >> weight_loss 0.12 > albumin 0.10 > ki67 0.09 >> all others <0.02. Age dominates.

Vitals (HR, SBP, SpO2), symptom grades (fatigue, pain, dyspnea, cough, appetite_loss), comorbidities (HTN, DM, COPD, CKD, HF, CAD, AF, VTE, autoimmune, depression), most labs (AST, ALT, hemoglobin, platelets, WBC, ANC, ALC, CA-125, CEA), pack-years, education, prior lines, years_since_dx, and SNPs all show |effect| trivially small with p>0.05 or |r|<0.02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Synthesis: PFS in this breast cancer cohort is driven primarily by (i) host biology (age, ECOG, albumin, weight loss), (ii) disease burden (stage IV, brain mets), (iii) tumor biology (ER/PR positive favorable; HER2+ and PIK3CA-mut unfavorable), and (iv) palbociclib in ER+/HER2- patients. Trastuzumab in HER2+, sacituzumab in HER2-low/TNBC, and pembrolizumab in TNBC/MSI-high show NO measurable PFS benefit in this dataset, while olaparib shows a modest benefit confined to BRCA1/2 carriers.

analyses.result_summary: All component claims supported by previously-run tests at p<0.05 (palbociclib x ER+ p=9e-229; HER2+ -> shorter PFS p=6e-70; PIK3CA -> shorter PFS p=6e-144; albumin/weight_loss/age all p<<1e-100; brain mets p=1e-178; ECOG/stage_iv p~0; olaparib in BRCA1/2 pooled p=0.041) and absence of effect for trastuzumab/sacituzumab/pembrolizumab in their candidate subgroups (all p>0.10).
